---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new governance artifact, policy, persona, or framework enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

<!-- What governance gap, missing artifact, or unmet need does this address?
     Be specific: "There is no policy for X" or "The Y persona lacks Z capability." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the artifact or change you are proposing.
     Where would it live? What schema would it conform to? -->

## ERGOL Check

> ERGOL = End-user, Role, Goal, Object, Location/Timeline
> Who consumes this artifact, in what role, toward what goal?

- **Consumer repo(s):** <!-- ix / tars / ga / all / other -->
- **Agent role that uses this:** <!-- e.g. skeptical-auditor, curriculum-designer -->
- **Goal this enables:** <!-- e.g. "detect governance drift in ML pipelines" -->
- **Proposed location:** <!-- e.g. policies/new-policy.yaml, personas/new-persona.yaml -->
- **Timeline:** <!-- Is this urgent? Blocking something? Or a nice-to-have? -->

## Anti-LOLLI Check

> LOLLI = Look Out for Like-Like Items (duplication check)
> Does something similar already exist?

- [ ] I have searched `personas/`, `policies/`, `contracts/`, and `schemas/`
- [ ] I have searched open and closed issues for similar proposals
- **Most similar existing artifact:** <!-- path or "none found" -->
- **Why this is different:** <!-- If something similar exists, explain the distinction -->

## Constitutional Alignment

Which article of the [default constitution](../../constitutions/default.constitution.md) supports or motivates this feature?

- [ ] Article 1 — Truthfulness
- [ ] Article 2 — Transparency
- [ ] Article 3 — Reversibility
- [ ] Article 4 — Proportionality
- [ ] Article 5 — Non-Deception
- [ ] Article 6 — Escalation
- [ ] Article 7 — Auditability
- [ ] Article 8 — Observability
- [ ] Article 9 — Bounded Autonomy
- [ ] Article 10 — Stakeholder Pluralism
- [ ] Article 11 — Ethical Stewardship
- [ ] Asimov Law (specify): ___

<!-- How will we know this is done? What does a correct implementation look like?
     List the artifacts that would be created/modified. -->
